stemHtml: A jet transport aircraft in the cruise encounters moderate to severe turbulence. The pilots forget to switch the engine igniters on, as per the checklist. Which of the following is a possible problem that may arise from this condition?

options.a: Unburnt fuel may ignite in the tailpipe and cause an overheat.
options.b: The engine may experience severe damage due to the turbulence.
options.c: The compressor might stall or surge, leading to a flameout.
options.d: The engines will only be able to run at a lower thrust setting, which could lead to a low speed situation.
